'''鈭歮-th-ch''' ('''mathacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quickscope|quickscope]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quickscope|quickscope]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-th-ch
|-
! Lemma
| mathacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mathachithi|mathachithi]] || [[word:mathachiji|mathachiji]] || [[word:mathachishi|mathachishi]] || [[word:mathachi|mathachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mathachuthuth|mathachuthuth]] || [[word:mathachujuj|mathachujuj]] || [[word:mathachushush|mathachushush]] || [[word:mathach|mathach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mathachuthu|mathachuthu]] || [[word:mathachuju|mathachuju]] || [[word:mathachushu|mathachushu]] || [[word:mathachu|mathachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mathachufuth|mathachufuth]] || [[word:mathachufuj|mathachufuj]] || [[word:mathachufush|mathachufush]] || [[word:mathachuf|mathachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mathachethe|mathachethe]] || [[word:mathacheje|mathacheje]] || [[word:mathacheshe|mathacheshe]] || [[word:mathache|mathache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mathachothoth|mathachothoth]] || [[word:mathachojoj|mathachojoj]] || [[word:mathachoshosh|mathachoshosh]] || [[word:mathach|mathach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mathachotho|mathachotho]] || [[word:mathachojo|mathachojo]] || [[word:mathachosho|mathachosho]] || [[word:mathacho|mathacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mathachofoth|mathachofoth]] || [[word:mathachofoj|mathachofoj]] || [[word:mathachofosh|mathachofosh]] || [[word:mathachof|mathachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mathach忙th忙|mathach忙th忙]] || [[word:mathach忙j忙|mathach忙j忙]] || [[word:mathach忙sh忙|mathach忙sh忙]] || [[word:mathach忙|mathach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mathachathath|mathachathath]] || [[word:mathachajaj|mathachajaj]] || [[word:mathachashash|mathachashash]] || [[word:mathach|mathach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mathachatha|mathachatha]] || [[word:mathachaja|mathachaja]] || [[word:mathachasha|mathachasha]] || [[word:mathacha|mathacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mathachafath|mathachafath]] || [[word:mathachafaj|mathachafaj]] || [[word:mathachafash|mathachafash]] || [[word:mathachaf|mathachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mathachasha|mathachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomathachasha|gomathachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimathachasha|gokimathachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mathachn眉sha|mathachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomathachnkn眉sha|gomathachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimathachn眉sha|gokimathachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mathachsh毛sha|mathachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomathachnksh毛sha|gomathachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimathachsh毛sha|gokimathachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mathachrosha|mathachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomathachnkrosha|gomathachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimathachrosha|gokimathachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mathachmusha|mathachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomathachnkmusha|gomathachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimathachmusha|gokimathachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mathachsherasha|mathachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomathachnksherasha|gomathachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimathachsherasha|gokimathachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mathachngasha|mathachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomathachnkngasha|gomathachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimathachngasha|gokimathachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mathachyasha|mathachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomathachnkyasha|gomathachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimathachyasha|gokimathachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mathachyamasha|mathachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomathachnkyamasha|gomathachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimathachyamasha|gokimathachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mathachn眉sh毛sha|mathachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomathachnkn眉sh毛sha|gomathachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimathachn眉sh毛sha|gokimathachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mathachn眉rosha|mathachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomathachnkn眉rosha|gomathachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimathachn眉rosha|gokimathachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mathachn眉musha|mathachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomathachnkn眉musha|gomathachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimathachn眉musha|gokimathachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mathachsh毛n眉sha|mathachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomathachnksh毛n眉sha|gomathachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimathachsh毛n眉sha|gokimathachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mathachsh毛rosha|mathachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomathachnksh毛rosha|gomathachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimathachsh毛rosha|gokimathachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mathachsh毛musha|mathachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomathachnksh毛musha|gomathachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimathachsh毛musha|gokimathachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mathachron眉sha|mathachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomathachnkron眉sha|gomathachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimathachron眉sha|gokimathachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mathachrosh毛sha|mathachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomathachnkrosh毛sha|gomathachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimathachrosh毛sha|gokimathachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mathachromusha|mathachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomathachnkromusha|gomathachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimathachromusha|gokimathachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mathachmun眉sha|mathachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomathachnkmun眉sha|gomathachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimathachmun眉sha|gokimathachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mathachmush毛sha|mathachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomathachnkmush毛sha|gomathachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimathachmush毛sha|gokimathachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mathachmurosha|mathachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomathachnkmurosha|gomathachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimathachmurosha|gokimathachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mathach|mathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:m忙th忙ch|m忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homathach|homathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hom忙th忙ch|hom忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomathach|hohomathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohom忙th忙ch|hohom忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉mathach|n眉mathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉m忙th忙ch|n眉m忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉mathach|n眉n眉mathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉m忙th忙ch|n眉n眉m忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂mathach|n茂mathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂m忙th忙ch|n茂m忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂mathach|n茂n茂mathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂m忙th忙ch|n茂n茂m忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumathach|lumathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lum忙th忙ch|lum忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumathach|lulumathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulum忙th忙ch|lulum忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limathach|limathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lim忙th忙ch|lim忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimathach|lilimathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilim忙th忙ch|lilim忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komathach|komathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kom忙th忙ch|kom忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomathach|kokomathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokom忙th忙ch|kokom忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemathach|kemathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kem忙th忙ch|kem忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemathach|kekemathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekem忙th忙ch|kekem忙th忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
